assessment_objectives.objective: an enterprise-wide web management policy, as well as associated standards, controls and procedures exists.
web security operations are conducted according to documented policies, standards, procedures and/or other organizational directives.
adequate resources (e.g., people, processes, technologies, data and/or facilities) are provided to support web security operations.
responsibility and authority for the performance of web security-related activities are assigned to designated personnel.
personnel performing web security-related activities have the skills and knowledge needed to perform their assigned duties.
